name: pria-fsmon
description: Pria in-VM file-write monitor (synaps_fsmon): a Rust SIBLING DAEMON using fanotify FAN_OPEN_PERM/FAN_ACCESS_PERM for inline ALLOW/DENY, an in-memory L1 policy cache, fail-closed posture, and structured audit. Launched by the Pria guest agent / systemd — NOT a Synaps-managed sidecar (HS-5).

commands.name: fsmon-build
commands.description: Build the synaps_fsmon file-write monitor binary (cargo release build).

commands.name: fsmon-check
commands.description: Verify the synaps_fsmon binary exists and a policy file parses.
